description: User begins interacting with the volunteer sign-up wizard
User advances to a new page in the volunteer wizard
User reaches the final confirmation page after submitting the volunteer form
User submits their email for a volunteer reminder link
Server-side: volunteer application received and processed
User views a CodeDay calendar event page (top of event registration funnel)
User views a CMS-managed form page (top of form submission funnel)
User views the donation page (top of donation funnel)
